metadata.philosophy: LAWIM is a ranking engine, not a filtering engine. Never hide a property just because it's not perfect.

dimensions.name: Geographic Compatibility
dimensions.description: Is the property where the client wants to live?

dimensions.name: Property Type
dimensions.description: Compatibility of property type with request

dimensions.name: Budget
dimensions.description: Budget gap measurement (preference, not absolute constraint)

dimensions.name: Freshness
dimensions.description: Recency and activity of the listing

badges.rule: Badges improve ranking but never replace compatibility
